title: A Song for Miss Julie
writer: Rowland Leigh, Michael Foster, Leighton Brill
actors: Shirley Ross, Barton Hepburn, Jane Farrar
plot: A Broadway writing team visits the granddaughter and great-great-granddaughters of a songwriter for his life story. An old diary holds interesting stories, but granny is protective of the family reputation. New romance complicates...
